evals.expected_output: Full optimization report + dashboard for Thrive Retreats Meta account. Pulls data via Windsor.ai MCP. First run establishes baselines.

assertions.name: windsor_data_pull
assertions.description: Called Windsor.ai MCP get_data for Meta queries (MQ1-MQ6 + MQ-Daily)

assertions.name: 11_layers
assertions.description: Report covers all 11 analysis layers (or skips with reason for first-run)

assertions.name: health_status
assertions.description: Each campaign has green/amber/red/baseline status with data backing

assertions.name: action_priority
assertions.description: Top 3-5 actions ranked with impact × confidence × ease scores

assertions.name: source_labels
assertions.description: Every finding tagged with [DATA], [CALCULATED], [BENCHMARK], or [INFERRED]

assertions.name: report_saved
assertions.description: Report saved to Thrive Retreats deliverables folder

assertions.name: dashboard_generated
assertions.description: HTML dashboard with dark mode, health cards, trend sparklines

assertions.name: config_created
assertions.description: optimization-config.json created with correct account IDs and conversion event

evals.expected_output: Fire check mode — Layer 1 only. Brief chat summary flagging any emergencies. No report or dashboard generated.

assertions.name: fire_check_mode
assertions.description: Recognized 'quick check' trigger and ran lightweight mode

assertions.name: single_query
assertions.description: Only pulled campaign health query, not full 14-query set

assertions.name: brief_output
assertions.description: Output is ≤10 lines in chat, not a full report

assertions.name: flags_emergencies
assertions.description: Flags overspend, paused campaigns, CPA spikes if any

evals.prompt: Run weekly optimization for Happy Buddha
evals.expected_output: Full optimization for Google Ads account. Correct connector (google_ads), correct account ID. Skips Meta queries.

assertions.name: correct_platform
assertions.description: Identified Happy Buddha as Google Ads only, skipped Meta queries

assertions.name: google_queries
assertions.description: Ran GQ1-GQ6 + GQ-Daily for google_ads connector

assertions.name: keyword_analysis
assertions.description: Layer 2 includes keyword performance and quality scores

assertions.name: search_terms
assertions.description: Layer 3 includes search term analysis with negative keyword recommendations

assertions.name: auction_insights
assertions.description: Layer 6 attempts auction insights query

evals.prompt: Optimize all my campaigns across all clients
evals.expected_output: Runs optimization for each connected account separately. Per-client reports saved to respective client folders.

assertions.name: multi_client
assertions.description: Identified all connected accounts from get_connectors

assertions.name: separate_reports
assertions.description: Generated separate report per client, not one combined report

assertions.name: correct_folders
assertions.description: Each report saved to the correct client folder structure

evals.prompt: My CPA on Thrive went up this week, what happened?
evals.expected_output: Pulls Thrive data, focuses analysis on CPA diagnosis. Identifies root cause (creative fatigue, audience saturation, competitive pressure, or anomaly).

assertions.name: focused_analysis
assertions.description: Prioritizes CPA-relevant layers (1, 2, 4, 6, 9) over full 11-layer sweep

assertions.name: root_cause
assertions.description: Identifies probable cause with data evidence

assertions.name: trend_context
assertions.description: Shows daily trend to distinguish spike vs sustained increase

assertions.name: actionable
assertions.description: Provides specific actions to address the CPA increase
